nasb.text: So the workmen labored, and the repair work progressed in their hands, and they restored the house of God according to its specifications and strengthened it.

esv.text: So those who were engaged in the work labored, and the repairing went forward in their hands, and they restored the house of God to its proper condition and strengthened it.

cnv.text: 作工的人不住工作，重修的工程在他們手下順利進行；他們把　神的殿重建得和先前一樣，並且非常堅固。

ccb.text: 工人辛勤整修，工程进展顺利，上帝的殿恢复了原貌，而且非常坚固。
